mapper.select: SELECT definition_param_id, flow_code, param_code, param_name, param_type, required, default_value, option_json, sort FROM flow_definition_param WHERE flow_code = #{flowCode} ORDER BY sort ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO flow_definition_param ( definition_param_id, flow_code, param_code, param_name, param_type, required, default_value, option_json, sort ) VALUES
(#{item.definitionParamId}, #{item.flowCode}, #{item.paramCode}, #{item.paramName}, #{item.paramType}, #{item.required}, #{item.defaultValue}, #{item.optionJson}, #{item.sort})
